column1: Joanna doesn't have a problem understanding maths.
Joanna has finished her basketball practice for the week.
Peter suggests Joanna does all her studying the night before the exam.
Joanna often doesn't have the energy to study at night.
Joanna will be happy if she gets a B.
Peter is taking a similar exam to Joanna's.
Peter and Joanna will study together for an hour.
